text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... My skin has been feeling kind of rough
lately. Especially on my cheeks...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...You think it's because it's dry and irritated?
M-maybe.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What should I do? ...Uh-huh. So, keep my skin
moisturized and make sure I eat lots of whole
foods...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I'll try focusing on that and see if it helps.
...Uh-huh. Thanks, Mom!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I hope it gets better soon...
